summary: This source consists of marketing copy from the SpaceX homepage. It briefly outlines the company's foundational mission to make humanity multiplanetary and its focus on developing fully reusable rockets to make space travel routine.

principles.statement: A future where humanity is out exploring the stars is fundamentally more exciting than one where we are not.
principles.rationale: This is the core philosophical belief that drove the founding of SpaceX and motivates the push to make life multiplanetary.
principles.source_quote: SpaceX was founded under the belief that a future where humanity is out exploring the stars is fundamentally more exciting than one where we are not.

signature_quotes.text: SpaceX was founded under the belief that a future where humanity is out exploring the stars is fundamentally more exciting than one where we are not.
signature_quotes.context: Describing the foundational motivation for making life multiplanetary.
